hero.title: Moroccan freshness, delivered to your kitchen every morning.
hero.subtitle: Fruits and vegetables hand-picked from the Souss region and Moroccan terroirs, calibrated to your specs. For hotels, restaurants, pâtisseries, and riads.

valueProp.title: One supplier. All the freshness Morocco has to offer.
valueProp.body: We source directly from growers in the Souss, Haouz and Gharb plains, run quality control at packing, and deliver before your morning service. No more stockouts, inconsistent calibres, or tired produce.

items.title: Picked yesterday, delivered this morning
items.body: Harvest D-1, packing in the evening, delivery between 6 and 10 AM in Marrakech intra-muros and Agadir bay.

items.title: Custom calibres and packaging
items.body: You choose the calibre, case weight, and packaging. We adapt to your spec sheet.

items.title: Field-to-plate traceability
items.body: Every batch carries the origin, harvest date, and grower name. GlobalGAP available on request.

items.title: A dedicated contact, on WhatsApp
items.body: Your account manager replies in French, English or Arabic — Monday through Saturday.

categories.title: Our range
categories.subtitle: Seven product families, more than 80 SKUs.

home.testimonialsEmpty: Our first reference clients are coming on board. Be among the first to taste — request a sample basket.

ctaBanner.title: Taste before you order.
ctaBanner.subtitle: We deliver a free sample basket to your venue. No commitment.

process.title: From a Moroccan orchard to your kitchen, in under 24 hours.
process.subtitle: A short, controlled, traceable operation. Three steps — never more.

steps.title: Hand-picked in the Souss
steps.body: Our partner growers pick to order, at peak ripeness. Every pallet is weighed, origin-labelled, and ships the same evening.

steps.title: Calibrated and packed at 4 °C
steps.body: Reception in Sidi Ghanem, visual and organoleptic QC, calibres matched to your spec sheet, packing in HACCP-compliant cold rooms.

steps.title: Delivered before service
steps.body: Probe-monitored refrigerated vans, slot confirmed the day before via WhatsApp. Marrakech intra-muros and Agadir bay, six days a week.

home.valueImageAlt: Hand-harvesting an orange in the Souss orchard

catalogue.title: Product catalogue
catalogue.subtitle: More than 80 SKUs, organised by family. Calibres, packaging, and seasonality listed for every product.

agrumes.name: Citrus
agrumes.description: Oranges, mandarins, lemons and clementines from Souss and Berkane.
agrumes.story: Berkane in the east and the Souss plain in the south: two Moroccan terroirs that produce some of the most sought-after citrus in the Mediterranean basin. Tight calibres, high juiciness, plot-level traceability.
agrumes.uses: Pastry kitchens, juice bars, breakfast trays, restaurant sauces and dressings.
agrumes.handling: Store between 5 and 8 °C. Take out of cold storage one hour before service to release aromas.

fruits-rouges.name: Berries
fruits-rouges.description: Strawberries from Larache, raspberries and blueberries from the Gharb.
fruits-rouges.story: The Gharb and Larache concentrate most of Morocco's berry production. Hand-picked at peak ripeness, packed in chilled punnets within 2 hours.
fruits-rouges.uses: Fine-dining pastry, dessert plating, smoothies, room-service mignardises.
fruits-rouges.handling: Strict cold chain at 2–4 °C. Shelf life 3–5 days. Never wash before storage.

fruits-exotiques.name: Exotic fruits
fruits-exotiques.story: Moroccan Hass avocado (Gharb, Loukkos) is now a fixture on palace menus. For other exotics, we complement with selected sources (Ivory Coast, Peru, Brazil) by season.
fruits-exotiques.uses: Tartares, ceviches, fruit platters, signature smoothies, fish accompaniments.
fruits-exotiques.handling: Controlled ripening on request (avocado, mango). Delivery at chosen ripening stage to match your service schedule.

fruits-saison.name: Seasonal fruits
fruits-saison.description: Moroccan apples, pears, grapes, melons and watermelons.
fruits-saison.story: Midelt and Imouzzer orchards for highland apples and pears, Doukkala and Souss for melons and grapes. A rich seasonality that covers the year through variety rotation.
fruits-saison.uses: Breakfast buffets, service platters, fruit salads, seasonal desserts.
fruits-saison.handling: Storage between 4 and 10 °C depending on the fruit. Apples and pears keep up to 30 days.

legumes-feuilles.name: Leafy vegetables
legumes-feuilles.story: Short-circuit production from the Haouz and Skhirat, largely greenhouse-grown to guarantee consistent quality and out-of-season availability.
legumes-feuilles.uses: Amuse-bouches, salads, garnishes, green smoothies, pestos.
legumes-feuilles.handling: Cold chain at 2–4 °C. Hydration controlled during transit. Optimal shelf life 3–5 days.

legumes-racines.name: Root vegetables & bulbs
legumes-racines.story: Doukkala, Berrechid, Saïs: Morocco's main root vegetable basins. Even calibres, brushed earth, packaging to suit kitchens (sacks, cases, paloxx).
legumes-racines.uses: Stews, garnishes, glazed vegetables, soups, condiments, juices.
legumes-racines.handling: Dry storage between 8 and 12 °C, away from light. Excellent shelf life (15–30 days depending on the item).

herbes.name: Aromatic herbs
herbes.description: Coriander, parsley, mint, basil, thyme, rosemary.
herbes.story: Naânaâ mint from Meknès, Genovese basil from our Souss greenhouses, wild thyme and rosemary from the Atlas. Daily cutting, bunches calibrated by weight.
herbes.uses: Tajines, salads, mint tea infusions, garnishes, flavoured oils, mignardises.
herbes.handling: Delivered in moistened bunches. Store between 4 and 8 °C wrapped in damp cloth. Shelf life 2–4 days.

detail.quoteThisProduct: Request a quote for this reference

why.title: Why Mediterra Fresh
why.subtitle: Four operational commitments that change your day in the kitchen.

coldChain.title: Controlled cold chain
coldChain.body: Storage at 4°C in our cold rooms in Sidi Ghanem, transport in monitored refrigerated vans (connected probes), minimal handling. HACCP-compliant.

delivery.title: Daily delivery, guaranteed slot
delivery.body: Marrakech intra-muros, Palmeraie, Targa: 6–10 AM. Agadir bay and Founty: 6–10 AM. Slot confirmed the day before via WhatsApp. 7-day delivery available in high tourist season.

moq.title: Accessible minimum order
moq.body: From 800 MAD ex-VAT in Marrakech, 1,000 MAD ex-VAT in Agadir. No minimum per SKU. Works for small riads and large resorts alike.

payment.title: Flexible payment terms
payment.body: Cash on delivery, 15 or 30-day bank transfer subject to credit, card payment on request. Weekly or monthly invoicing aligned with your accounting cycle.

certifications.title: Certifications and traceability
certifications.body: ONSSA on every product. GlobalGAP and Bio Maroc available on eligible SKUs. Traceability sheet attached to each delivery on request.

zones.title: Delivery zones
zones.body: Marrakech (30 km radius), Agadir (25 km radius), Essaouira and Taroudant on request. We assess your zone if you're elsewhere in Morocco.

references.title: References
references.subtitle: Trust is earned. We list here only the venues that have given written permission.
references.empty: Our commercial team is building its first references. You can be one of the pilot venues — get in touch for preferential terms.
references.segmentsBody: Our offer is calibrated for venues that don't tolerate compromise on quality. Here are the six segments we commit to deliver every morning.

hotels.title: 4–5 star hotels & resorts
hotels.body: Daily breakfast buffets, banquets, room service. Uniform calibres, delivery before 9 a.m.

riads.title: Riads & guesthouses
riads.body: Smaller volumes, identical standards. Monday–Saturday delivery within central Marrakech.

restaurants.title: Fine-dining restaurants
restaurants.body: Short-circuit sourcing, precise calibres, bouquet herbs, rare seasonal fruits on request.

patisseries.title: Pastries & artisan bakeries
patisseries.body: Berries, citrus, exotics sourced for pastry work. Tight calibres, certified freshness.

juiceBars.title: Juice bars & wellness cafés
juiceBars.body: Daily citrus and seasonal fruit volumes, smoothie-grade vegetables, controlled food cost.

catering.title: Event catering
catering.body: Weddings, conferences, cocktails. Quotes for one-off volumes, on-site delivery, custom packaging.

references.pilotBody: We're starting with a limited number of clients so we can guarantee a level of service we won't dilute. In return, our pilot partners benefit from enhanced terms and dedicated support for 6 months.
pilotBenefits: Priority 6 a.m.–10 a.m. delivery slot, 30-minute window
Direct WhatsApp line to our operations lead
Free menu audit with seasonal recommendations
Monthly reporting: service rate, savings vs. competitors

commitments.label: Response to any quote request, Monday to Saturday
Daily delivery window across central Marrakech and the Agadir bay
Contractual service rate, measured and reported monthly
Traceable goods — origin, batch, harvest date on every delivery slip

blog.title: News & calendars
blog.subtitle: Seasonal calendars, product tips, and behind-the-scenes from our growers.
blog.newsletterBody: A monthly letter, no noise: what's available now, product tips, key dates.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Reply within 2 business hours, Monday to Saturday.

channels.whatsapp: WhatsApp Business — fast reply, in 3 languages

form.title: Contact form
form.subtitle: Describe your need, we'll come back to you with a proposal.
form.name: Full name
form.consent: I agree to be contacted about my request. My data will not be shared with third parties (Law 09-08).
form.success: Thanks — your request has been received. We'll reply within 2 business hours.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please contact us directly on WhatsApp.

footer.tagline: B2B fresh produce supplier — Marrakech & Agadir.

newsletter.title: Seasonal newsletter
newsletter.body: Harvest calendars and catalogue news, once a month.
